title: Delivery Driver CV Example UK — Van & Multi-Drop

cv.name: Ryan Cooper
cv.title: Delivery Driver
cv.summary: Delivery driver with 4 years multi-drop van experience across the West Midlands. Clean UK licence, strong customer service, and handheld POD scanning. Available for 6-day weeks and peak seasons.

bullets: Completed 90+ deliveries daily with 97% first-time delivery success rate
Maintained clean licence with zero at-fault incidents over 4 years
Handled customer queries and redeliveries professionally at the door
Delivered same-day parcels across Birmingham B-postcode districts
Used handheld scanners for real-time POD and route updates

education.degree: UK Full Driving Licence (Clean) · Level 2 Customer Service
education.raw: UK Full Driving Licence (Clean) · Level 2 Customer Service — 2019
